_comment: Persistent ledger for the FindQuestions question bank. `used` lists questions that became published posts; `skipped` lists questions deterministically rejected (e.g. duplicate-topic) so the auto-blog action never re-picks them. Both arrays exclude IDs from the next pick. Pre-populated with question IDs already answered by existing 2026-05-22 posts so the action does not generate near-duplicates. Do not edit by hand unless you intend to recycle a question.
